text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna! I don't wanna! No way! I said I'm not going, so I'm not going!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's going on all of a sudden?! You were so
giddy yesterday when you suggested we have
lunch together...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. What do you care?! I just said I'm not
going to the cafeteria! That's all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But, but! You might pass out if you go to class on
an empty stomach!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ughhh!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's it! I thought up a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I can just use some Fill-Up Fast magic! C'mon,
let's combine our power and cast a grand spell!
choice_data_list: You want me to help cast the spell?!
You want me to help cast the spell?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh... Umm! O miracle grain, fill me up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Invisible Wheat! ☆ ...Okay! Now I don't even need
to eat anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rumble...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Nghhh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You know, I really think it'd be best if you ate
something... Let's go together, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But... today is...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Today's the one day I can't go to the cafeteria!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on with Sweep?!
choice_data_list: She did say she can't go to the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right... There has to be a reason! Come on,
Trainer, let's go after her!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! There you are! Um... is there something
you're not saying? 'Cause you know you can tell
us!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I can't! I can't, I can't! You said it yourself earlier,
Kitasan...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: The cafeteria's holding its Yakiniku Fair today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's why I don't wanna go! If I'm in a place
where they're grilling, my hat will end up smelling
like grease and smoke!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I don't want that to happen! Granny gave me this
hat, and there's only one like it in the whole
world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep's Granny
text_block_list.text:
Now listen carefully, Sweepy. A very special spell
has been cast on this hat. It's a magic spell just for
you.

text_block_list.name: Young Sweep
text_block_list.text:
Magic?! Wow, that's amazing! Thank you,
Grandma!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This hat is Magical Girl Sweepy's trusty
companion! I can't let anything bad happen to it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'd never leave it in the classroom or anywhere
unsafe! Any location not protected by a magical
barrier is out of the question!
choice_data_list: You sure take good care of that hat.
You sure take good care of that hat.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: So that's what this is about. I actually know how you feel! The souvenir my dad gave me means the world to me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But... Ahaha! You don't have to worry about your
hat smelling funny!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You see, yesterday I heard the cafeteria was
short-staffed, so I went to help prepare for the
fair... Turns out they grill everything in the
kitchen, not at your table!
choice_data_list: Then there's nothing to worry about.
Then there's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And it all looked really delicious!
Ribs, offal, skirt steak... All marinated in a special
sauce! And the grilled carrots smelled amaaazing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. That does sound pretty nice... And I guess
I don't have to worry about the smell either...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'm suddenly feeling really hungry! ♪
C'mon, let's get over there before the yakiniku
sells out!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, wait for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Sweep Tosho's foul mood was born from
the desire to protect her precious hat. In the end,
though, the two Umamusume run along to the
cafeteria.
